disclaimer: Menu and prices shown are based on our delivery menu and may differ slightly in-store. Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness. Please tell your server if anyone in your party has a food allergy.

sections.title: Ramen
sections.note: The bowls people drive across the Sound for. Ramen offerings rotate — call us for today's bowls and prices.

items.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
items.description: Rich, savory pork-bone broth simmered low and slow, with tender chashu pork, noodles, egg, and scallion.

items.name: Shoyu Ramen
items.description: Clear soy-based broth with depth that regulars rave about — noodles, pork, egg, and greens.

items.name: Duck Spring Roll
items.description: Lettuce, cucumber, and BBQ duck wrapped with pancake and sauce.

items.name: Beef Negimaki (8 pc)
items.description: Thinly sliced beef rolled with scallion and broiled with teriyaki sauce.

items.name: Fried Calamari
items.description: Marinated calamari served with katsu sauce.

items.name: Shrimp Tempura
items.description: Deep-fried shrimp and vegetable.

items.name: Vegetable Harumaki (6 pc)
items.description: Crispy Japanese spring rolls filled with cabbage, carrots, mung bean vermicelli, green beans, and onions.

items.name: Vegetable Gyoza (6 pc)
items.description: Pan-fried vegetable dumplings.

items.name: Edamame
items.description: Steamed soybeans with sea salt.

items.name: Shumai (6 pc)
items.description: Shrimp and vegetable steamed dumplings.

items.name: Age Tofu
items.description: Deep-fried bean curd served with grated ginger in sauce.

items.name: Gyoza (6 pc)
items.description: Pan-fried meat dumplings.

items.name: Enoki Miso Soup
items.description: Miso broth with enoki mushroom and vegetables.

items.description: Clear broth with mushroom, seaweed, and scallion.
